mapper.sql: id, employee_no, employee_name, gender, position, phone, email, department, status, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_employee WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM tbl_employee
deleted = 0
AND employee_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeName}, '%')
AND employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeNo}, '%')
AND position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{position}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_employee
deleted = 0
AND employee_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeName}, '%')
AND employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeNo}, '%')
AND position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{position}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_employee ( employee_no, employee_name, gender, position, phone, email, department, status, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeNo}, #{employeeName}, #{gender}, #{position}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{department}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_employee
update_time = NOW(), employee_no = #{employeeNo}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, gender = #{gender}, position = #{position}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, department = #{department}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_employee SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
